form:Label.label: Agregar Personas a Estructura de Seguridad
form:Label.name: lbl_titulo

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EMP.d_empresa as EMPRESA, PER.oi_personal as id, LEG.e_numero_legajo as LEGAJO, PER.d_ape_y_nom as APE_Y_NOM FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP JOIN PER.oi_personal INNER LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa WHERE PER.oi_personal IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

form:Resource.declare: <PARAM activos="1" empresa="196" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" />
form:Resource.name: qry_persona

qry:select.name: sql1

form:Resource.declare: <PARAM empresa="196" leg_list="1,2,3" leg_desde1="10" leg_hasta1="15" leg_desde2="18" leg_hasta2="23" leg_desde3="27" leg_hasta3="30" fecha_desde="20101012" fecha_hasta="20111012"/>
form:Resource.name: qry_legajo

qry:select.name: sql1
sql1
sql_estructuras
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ESTR.oi_estructura as estructura FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ESTR WHERE ESTR.oi_estr_padre = {#PARAM:@estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_ubi_desde
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_UBICACIONES.c_ubicacion FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES WHERE 1 = 1 {%?(#SOURCE:@ubicacion_desde!='') {% AND ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion = {#SOURCE:@ubicacion_desde}%} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_ubi_hasta
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_UBICACIONES.c_ubicacion FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES WHERE 1 = 1 {%?(#SOURCE:@ubicacion_hasta!='') {% AND ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion = {#SOURCE:@ubicacion_hasta} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER.oi_personal FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP JOIN PER.oi_personal INNER LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa, LEG.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE 1=1 {%?(#SOURCE:@activos='1') {% and LEG.oi_indic_activo= \'1\' %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@empresa!='') {% and LEG.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@empresa} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@afjp!='') {% and PER.oi_afjp = {#SOURCE:@afjp} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@obra_social!='') {% and LEG.oi_obra_social = {#SOURCE:@obra_social} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@sindicato!='') {% and LEG.oi_sindicato = {#SOURCE:@sindicato} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@where!='') {% and {%=#SOURCE:@where %} %} {% %} %} GROUP BY PER.oi_personal ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER.oi_personal as id, EMP.c_empresa as EMPRESA, LEG.e_numero_legajo as LEGAJO FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP JOIN PER.oi_personal INNER LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa WHERE LEG.oi_personal_emp IN ({%=#SOURCE:@values%}) ')/ROWS/ROW
